skills.name: research-planner
skills.description: Orchestrates multi-step research workflows combining web search, source evaluation, and synthesis into structured reports. Use when the user needs to research a topic, compare sources, or produce a research brief.
skills.author: ferris-aegis

skills.name: web-search
skills.description: Performs multi-source web search aggregation with result ranking, deduplication, and credibility scoring. Use when the user needs to search the web, find information online, look up a topic, or gather sources.
skills.author: ferris-aegis

skills.name: code-reviewer
skills.description: Performs comprehensive code review combining security analysis, quality assessment, and best-practice checking. Use when the user wants code reviewed, asks for security issues, requests a code audit, or wants to check code quality.
skills.author: ferris-aegis
